prompt:
A small autonomous robot with two main drive wheels and a sensor array at the front is paused inside a simple tabletop maze made from low white walls arranged in a few right-angle turns. The camera looks slightly down on the scene, showing the maze layout from above while keeping the robot prominent in the frame. On top of the robot, a microcontroller board and neatly bundled wires connect to forward-facing distance sensors, making it clear that the robot is using them to navigate the maze rather than following a line.

The environment is a bright 2040s makerspace with clean wooden or white work surfaces, potted plants, and modular shelving holding labeled containers and 3D-printed parts. Soft, cinematic lighting and a gently stylized photorealistic look fit a solarpunk aesthetic, with no visible logos or text. The composition keeps the maze and robot as the main focus, while the background workshop context fades into a pleasant blur.
